title: Innovation Stations: Python Coding 101
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Python Coding 101 is a beginner-friendly workshop designed to introduce teens to the exciting world of programming using the versatile and widely-used Python language. Led by ArrayScape, this hands-on session will break down the basics of coding in an approachable, engaging way, perfect for those with little to no prior experience.
